item.text:
I can’t safely fix “it” without a target. Send one of these:

1. What’s broken: failing test, error message, UI issue, or file/function?
2. What should happen instead?
3. How should I verify the fix: test command, repro steps, or expected output?

Also note: this session is currently read-only, so I can inspect and diagnose, but I won’t be able to edit files unless write access is enabled.
